item.name: Pewter Ring Coffer (IL 525)
item.description:
A pewter-lined chest containing a ring, one size to fit them all.

Required level: 82. IL: 525. Ring type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Mama, She Is in Rubble Deep
